mapper.select: select count(distinct donor_phone) as count from donation where project_id = #{projectId} and donation_status = 1
select max(amount) as maxDonation from donation where project_id = #{projectId} and donation_status = 1
select min(amount) as minDonation from donation where project_id = #{projectId} and donation_status = 1
select count(*) as count from donation where project_id = #{projectId} and donation_status = 1
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) AS projectCount FROM donation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND donation_status = 1
